languages.text: Несмотря на затхлый воздух кельи, богато инкрустированная драгоценностями витрина выглядит так, словно за ней все это время тщательно ухаживали. На прозрачном глянцевом стекле нет ни одной пылинки.

traits.locale_text: Несмотря на затхлый воздух кельи, богато инкрустированная драгоценностями витрина выглядит так, словно за ней всё это время тщательно ухаживали. На прозрачном глянцевом стекле нет ни одной пылинки.

languages.text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.
languages.original_text: Несмотря на затхлый воздух кельи, богато инкрустированная драгоценностями витрина выглядит так, словно за ней все это время тщательно ухаживали. На прозрачном глянцевом стекле нет ни одной пылинки.

traits.locale_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

languages.text: 小さな部屋の空気は古く、しかし、宝石で飾られたケースは、まるで丁寧に手入れされてきたかのように輝いている。ガラスは澄み渡り、埃ひとつない。
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

languages.text: Küçük odadaki havasızlığa rağmen zengin mücevherlerle süslü vitrin, bunca zaman titizlikle korunmuş gibi görünüyor. Berrak, pırıl pırıl camın üzerinde tek bir toz zerresi bile yok.
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

traits.locale_text: Küçük odadaki havasızlığa rağmen zengin mücevherlerle süslü vitrin, bunca zaman titizlikle korunmuş gibi görünüyor. Berrak, pırıl pırıl camın üzerinde tek bir toz zerresi bile yok.

languages.text: 狭小的舱室空气滞闷，但镶满珠宝的陈列柜却仿佛一直受到精心呵护，澄亮的玻璃表面纤尘不染。
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

traits.locale_text: 狭小的舱室空气滞闷，但镶满珠宝的陈列柜却仿佛一直受到精心呵护，澄亮的玻璃表面纤尘不染。

languages.text: Trotz der schalen Luft in der kleinen Kammer scheint die mit Edelsteinen besetzte Vitrine in all der Zeit akribisch gepflegt worden zu sein. Auf dem sauberen, schimmernden Glas ist kein Körnchen Staub zu sehen.
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

traits.locale_text: Trotz der schalen Luft in der kleinen Kammer scheint die mit Edelsteinen besetzte Vitrine in all der Zeit akribisch gepflegt worden zu sein. Auf dem sauberen, schimmernden Glas ist kein Körnchen Staub zu sehen.

languages.text: Malgré l'air vicié qui emplit la petite pièce, la vitrine de bijoux semble avoir été soigneusement entretenue. Vous n'y décelez pas le moindre grain de poussière.
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

traits.locale_text: Malgré l'air vicié qui emplit la petite pièce, la vitrine de bijoux semble avoir été soigneusement entretenue. Vous n'y décelez pas le moindre grain de poussière.

languages.text: Pese al aire rancio de la pequeña sala, el ornamentado expositor parece haber recibido un mantenimiento meticuloso todo este tiempo. No hay ni una mota de polvo en el reluciente cristal.
languages.original_text: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.

traits.locale_text: Pese al aire rancio de la pequeña sala, el ornamentado expositor parece haber recibido un mantenimiento meticuloso todo este tiempo. No hay ni una mota de polvo en el reluciente cristal.
